CustomField.formula: (Appointment__r.Medical_Procedure__r.Always_send_SMS__c) ||( ISPICKVAL( question_type__c ,'OTP') || CONTAINS( Automation_name__c , "פורטל טפסים") ) || Appointment__r.ADName__c = 'internet_site'&& Automation_name__c = 'logic to send institute sms' || CONTAINS( SmsTemplate__c , "IVR")|| CONTAINS(Automation_name__c, 'שליחת OTP עבור איש קשר למטופל') || CONTAINS(Automation_name__c, 'Send Secret Code OTP')
CustomField.label: SMS Always
